name: Buttermilk Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 10-inch tube pan with nonstick vegetable coating; set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, cream sugar and margarine together. Beat in egg substitute, buttermilk, and vanilla.
In a separate medium mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Add to the wet ingredients and mix well.
In a small bowl, combine topping ingredients: 1/3 cup Sugar, 1 tsp Ground cinnamon, and 1/4 tsp Pecans (chopped and toasted).
Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with half of the toppings; repeat layer.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before serving.
